sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10863" key="a)nuphresi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυπηρε-σία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10863.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unserviceableness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg006:p.49D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.49D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
